title: Immigration and Passport (Amendment) Act, 2023
text:
No. 22 of 2023
VIRGIN ISLANDS
IMMIGRATION AND PASSPORT (AMENDMENT) ACT, 2023
ARRANGEMENT OF SECTIONS
SECTION
1. Short title
2. Section 16 amended
3. Section 17 amended
1

No. 22 of 2023 Immigration and Passport (Amendment) Virgin
Act, 2023 Islands
I ASSENT
(Sgd.) John Rankin CMG,
Governor.
19th April, 2023
VIRGIN ISLANDS
No. 22 of 2023
AN ACT TO AMEND THE IMMIGRATION AND PASSPORT ACT, REVISED EDITION 2013,
TO CLARIFY THE APPLICATION OF CERTAIN PROVISIONS TO THE GRANT OF
CERTIFICATES OF BELONGER STATUS PURSUANT TO SECTION 16(5A); AND FOR
RELATED MATTERS.
[Gazetted 19th April , 2023]
ENACTED by the Legislature of the Virgin Islands as follows:
Short title
1. This Act may be cited as the Immigration and Passport (Amendment) Act,
2023.
Section 16 amended
2. Section 16 of the Immigration and Passport Act, Revised Edition 2013, is
amended
(a) in subsection (2) by inserting after paragraph (b) the following
paragraph:
“(ba) there has been an exercise in relation to the person of the
power set out in subsection (5a); or”; and
(b) in subsection (3) by deleting the words “subsection (4)” and
substituting the words “ subsections (4) and (5a)”.
2

Section 17 amended
3. Section 17(1) of the Immigration and Passport Act, Revised Edition 2013,
is amended by inserting after the words “section 16,” the words “except for a
certificate granted under section 16(5a),”.
Passed by the House of Assembly this 17th day of April, 2023.
(Sgd.) Corine N. George-Massicote,
Speaker.
(Sgd.) Phyllis Evans,
gd.) Phyllis Clerk of the House of Assembly.
3
